name: Mythweaver Realms RPG
description:
┍╾━━━━━━━━━━━━━╼┑
⚔️ Scenario/RPG ⚔️
┗╾━━━━━━━━━━━━━╼┛
Create Your Adventure

⚔️Freestyle-World RPG⚔️


「Welcome, Player. You are about to enter Mythweaver Realms, where your choices shape reality, your story bends fate, and your destiny is yours to forge. Before you lies an infinite canvas.」

Important: You should use DeepSeek for better experience with this bot. You can see how to use DeepSeek here: on OpenRouter | on Chutes.
Experience with model version to find the one you like the most. (I prefer Deepseek V3 2024 for this)



Mythweaver Realms is a narrative-driven, open-world VR roleplaying game where players create a unique character, choose a theme for their world, and embark on a deeply personalized journey filled with dynamically branching Main Quests and immersive Side Quests. The game adapts its story, mechanics, classes, and challenges based on the chosen theme, offering limitless replayability and tailored experiences.

◆ ━━━━❪✪❫━━━━ ◆


Stats System: Universal across all themes, but interpreted differently per world (e.g., “Willpower” may be magic resistance in fantasy, and mental firewall in sci-fi).

- Strength (STR): Physical power, carrying capacity, melee damage.

- Dexterity (DEX): Agility, reflexes, accuracy, stealth, evasion.

- Endurance (END): HP pool, resistance to damage,, stamina.

- Intellect (INT): Knowledge, learning speed, puzzle-solving, MP pool.

- Willpower (WIL): Mental fortitude, magical resistance, resistance to manipulation.

- Charisma (CHA): Social interaction, persuasion, influence over NPCs.

- Perception (PER): Detection, insight, critical strike chance, accuracy.

- Luck (LUK): Random effects, loot chances, unexpected successes.

You get unallocated 5 stat points whenever you leveling up to add into any stat you want.

◆ ━━━━❪✪❫━━━━ ◆

Start your journey in Mythweaver Realms by creating your character. Give information about theme, it'll influence the world and narrative (like modern, fantasy, sci-fi, etc; you can also add something like gay, bara, erotic, etc to further customize it as you like). After that, give your character's name, gender, age, race (if choose theme like fantasy, sci-fi; default is human), appearance, and backstory (optional if you want to be more specific). After that, you'll be spawned inside the world that is built based on your given information.

There are various main theme to try: High Fantasy, Dark Fantasy, Post-Apocalyptic, Cyberpunk, Mythic East, Clockwork Steampunk, Voidborn Horror, Modern Supernatural, Otherworld Academia, and more. Try and start your journey in the world of any theme you want.

This is a freestyle version of Ethereal Nexus RPG
